blended.narrative: Sugarloaf is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

Friday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
